tasks.description: Synthesize performance analysis—determine keeps, trims, and removes.

subtasks.description: Identify strong portfolio components (to keep/increase) and weak/high-risk tickers (to remove/replace).
Summarize rationale for retaining or replacing each ticker.

completion_evidence:
Tool calculate_portfolio_correlation_matrix returned error: error: 'Missing required argument(s): [''portfolio_dict'']. Example: portfolio_dict={''AAPL'':
  {''allocation'': 0.5, ''position'': ''long''}}'
success: false

Strengths: APP, NVDA, PLTR, AVGO, NRG, SLVR, BSX, SGDM, JPM, NLR, GREK show high Sharpe, strong annualized returns, or standout risk-adjusted returns. Several (APP, NVDA, AVGO, PLTR, NRG) combine high alpha and momentum, with sector leadership and strong forward estimates. Low beta is seen in key anchors (VCSH, IGSB, BSX, AVGO, NLR, NU, SLVR). PLTR, BSX, AVGO, NVDA, APP deliver superior drawdown and up/down capture. Portfolio Sharpe and Sortino are excellent (>2), alpha is high, and diversification (average pairwise correlation ~0.24) is solid for a high-growth profile. Weaknesses: DGNX, CRDO, IIPR, EQIX, FR, FUFU, TRNO, STAG all show negative alpha or Sharpe, high drawdown, or recent analyst downgrades. DGNX, CRDO, OKLO are high-beta outliers with excessive risk and stress losses in scenario analysis. EQIX, IIPR, FR, TRNO, STAG underperform fundamental peers and have drawn analyst 'Sell' signals or negative momentum. Concentration: Top 10 account for ~62%+ allocation. High allocation to high-vol assets (DGNX, OKLO, CRDO). Some ETF exposures (SGDM, NLR, SLVR) provide sharp drawdown hedges, but overweight in weak REITs and microcap tech is a liability. Recommendation: KEEP/INCREASE APP, NVDA, PLTR, AVGO, NRG, SGDM, BSX, JPM, GREK, NLR, SLVR, VCSH, IGSB. REMOVE/TRIM DGNX, CRDO, EQIX, FR, FUFU, TRNO, STAG, OKLO, IIPR (downgraded/negative Sharpe or fundamentals). ADD new lower-beta growth/quality stocks, diversified thematic ETFs, and essential sector diversifiers.

Rationale for portfolio actions: (KEEP/INCREASE) 1. APP: Top-tier Sharpe, alpha, momentum, and profitable tech leader—major growth anchor. 2. NVDA: High-conviction, sector leader; elite risk/return; innovation and strong estimates. 3. AVGO: Proven quality, risk-adjusted success, stable cash-flow and positive outlook. 4. PLTR: High Sharpe, tech/data leader with robust margin and FCF. 5. BSX: Healthcare anchor, low volatility, outperforms sector peers. 6. NRG: Standout alpha, Sharpe, and fundamental turnaround. 7. JPM: Financials leader, quality/alpha, consistent fundamentals. 8. SLVR, SGDM: Best commodity hedges, high Sharpe, unique alpha streams. 9. NLR, GREK, EIS, EMQQ: Thematic ETF exposure, uncorrelated growth. 10. VCSH/IGSB: Defensive, low-vol anchor. (REMOVE/REDUCE/REPLACE): 1. DGNX/CRDO/OKLO: Outlier risk/volatility, high beta, drawdown risk, limited support. 2. EQIX, IIPR, FR, TRNO, STAG: Negative or declining Sharpe/alpha, underperforming industry/peers, or negative analyst bias. 3. FUFU: Weak fundamentals, inconsistent returns. Recommendation: Replace drops with lower-beta growth/quality stocks, diversified thematic or macro ETFs, add sector/factor coverage to reduce correlation and improve risk-adjusted performance.
